title: Daoist Canon: Zhang Sanfeng: Treatise on Tai Chi (Section 7)
description: From the Daoist Canon: Zhang Sanfeng: Treatise on Tai Chi
introduction: From the Daoist Canon: Zhang Sanfeng: Treatise on Tai Chi

translation.text: From the Zhang Sanfeng: Treatise on Tai Chi of the Daoist Canon: One of the foundational scriptures of Chinese Taoism, preserving teachings on internal alchemy, meditation, ritual, and the cultivation of immortality.
